description: Project, initiative, program, or milestone representing a planned undertaking with defined goals

description.description: Brief description of the project scope and objectives

owner.description: Project owner, sponsor, or responsible person

status.description: 项目当前的阶段或状态

end_date.description: 项目结束或目标完成日期（ISO 8601 格式）

budget.description: 项目已批准的预算或已拨付的资金
